scripts.electron:dev: npm run electron:compile && concurrently --kill-others --names "next,tsc,electron" "next dev --webpack" "tsc --project tsconfig.electron.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: next build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder
scripts.electron:pack: next build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --dir
